title: Cobbleton Forever Modpack
description: The official modpack for the Cobbleton Forever Minecraft server. Enhance your experience on the server with this modpack!
body:
Enhance your experience on the Cobbleton Forever Minecraft server with this modpack! It includes various quality of life enhancements to make your gameplay experience even better. Included are:
* Various performance enhancing mods
* Simple Voice Chat
* Ping Wheel for pinging locations just like in Fortnite
* Sorting buttons for inventories and chests
* New fun visual effects
* ...and more!

⚠️ NOTE: This is not a Cobble**mon** modpack or server.
